mapper.select: SELECT A.INIT_REGIST_DT, A.CUST_NO, A.TRAD_NO, A.BIZ_TYPE, A.PRDCT_ID, A.PRDCT_CD, A.PRDCT_NM, A.CALL_CNTR_STS_CD, A.PRGRSS_STS_CD, A.RJCTN_CD, A.RJCTN_MSG, A.CDD_REQ_CD, A.ID_CARD_CD, A.AUTHNT_IND_CD, A.NEW_USER_FLG, A.CMPLTN_DT, A.CNCL_DT, A.BRNCH_NO, A.REQ_AMT, A.AUTHNT_IND, A.LST_CHNG_DT, A.KFB_ACCT_NO, A.ALLIANC_CD, A.EFFCTV_INT, A.LOAN_PRD, A.RDMPTN_MTHD, A.EXEC_DT, A.RDMPTN_DT, A.LOAN_REQ_NO, A.EMAIL_ADDR, A.ERR_CD, A.ERR_MSG, A.KFB_MGT_NO, A.KTNET_MGT_NO, A.INT_TYPE, A.COPL_CMMN_CLLTRL_IND, A.LOAN_ACCPT_NO, A.CURRENCY_CODE, B.SSN FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT A, NF_CUST_MGT B WHERE A.CUST_NO = B.CUST_NO AND A.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND A.TRAD_NO = #{tradNo} WITH UR

SELECT INIT_REGIST_DT, CUST_NO, TRAD_NO, BIZ_TYPE, PRDCT_ID, PRDCT_CD, PRDCT_NM, CALL_CNTR_STS_CD, PRGRSS_STS_CD, CDD_REQ_CD, ID_CARD_CD, AUTHNT_IND_CD, VARCHAR_FORMAT(LST_CHNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') LST_CHNG_DT, VARCHAR_FORMAT(AUTHNT_REQ_CMPLTN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AUTHNT_REQ_CMPLTN_DT, AUTHNT_IND FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT WHERE PRGRSS_STS_CD = 'PRGS' AND CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND TRAD_REG_GB = #{tradRegGb} ORDER BY TRAD_NO DESC WITH UR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NF_TRADINFO_MGT ( INIT_REGIST_DT, CUST_NO, TRAD_NO, PRDCT_CD, PRDCT_NM, CALL_CNTR_STS_CD, PRGRSS_STS_CD, CLERK_NO, CNNCTN_WAY, LST_CHNG_DT, TRAD_REG_GB, REA_CD, CHANNEL_TYPE ) VALUES ( CURRENT TIMESTAMP, #{custNo}, NEXTVAL FOR NF_TRADINFO_MGT_TRAD_NO_SQ, #{prdctCd}, #{prdctNm}, #{callCntrStsCd}, #{prgrssStsCd}, #{clerkNo}, #{cnnctnWay}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, (CASE #{tradRegGb} WHEN '1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END), #{reaCd}, 'MB' )

SELECT NEXTVAL FOR NF_TRADINFO_MGT_TRAD_NO_SQ FROM SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
INSERT INTO NF_TRADINFO_MGT ( INIT_REGIST_DT, CUST_NO, TRAD_NO, BIZ_TYPE, PRDCT_ID, PRDCT_CD, PRDCT_NM, CALL_CNTR_STS_CD, PRGRSS_STS_CD, CNNCTN_WAY, CLERK_NO, JOB_DETAIL_CD, CDD_REQ_CD, CDD_CNFRM_DT, ID_CARD_CD, ID_CARD_CNT, NEW_USER_FLG, DEL_OBJ_FLG, BRNCH_NO, ERR_CD, ERR_MSG, LST_CHNG_DT, PER_PART, DOC_EVDC_CD, TRAD_REG_GB, HL_PRSN_CD, AD_SBST_CD, KW_INSR_CD, REA_CD, CHANNEL_TYPE , INTEGRATED_CONSELING_YN , PRE_LOAN_MOVE_YN , REAL_LOAN_MOVE_YN , HQ_PRIME_RATE_APPLY_YN , HQ_PRIME_RATE , GOVM_DATA_TYPE , GOVM_SIGN_TYPE , GOVM_SIGN_ERR , LOAN_PURPOSE , COLLATERAL_TYPE , OPL_CNSLT_YN ) VALUES ( CURRENT TIMESTAMP, #{custNo}, #{tradNo}, #{bizType}, #{prdctId}, #{prdctCd}, #{prdctNm}, #{callCntrStsCd}, 'PRGS', #{cnnctnWay}, #{clerkNo}, #{jobDetailCd}, (CASE #{cddReqCd} WHEN 'Y' THEN NULL WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE 'N' END), CURRENT TIMESTAMP, (CASE #{idCardCd} WHEN 'Y' THEN NULL WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE 'N' END), 0, #{newUserFlg}, #{delObjFlg}, #{brnchNo}, #{errCd}, #{errMsg}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, #{perPart}, #{docEvdcCd}, (CASE #{tradRegGb} WHEN '1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END), #{hlPrsnCd}, #{adSbstCd}, #{kwInsrCd}, #{reaCd}, 'MB' , #{integratedConselingYn} , #{preLoanMoveYn} , #{realLoanMoveYn} , #{hqPrimeRateApplyYn} , #{hqPrimeRate} , #{govmDataType} , #{govmSignType} , #{govmSignErr} , #{loanPurpose} , #{collateralType} , #{oplCnsltYn} )

SELECT NEXTVAL FOR NF_TRADINFO_MGT_TRAD_NO_SQ FROM SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
INSERT INTO NF_TRADINFO_MGT ( INIT_REGIST_DT, CUST_NO, TRAD_NO, BIZ_TYPE, PRDCT_ID, PRDCT_CD, PRDCT_NM, CDD_REQ_CD, BRNCH_NO, LST_CHNG_DT ) VALUES ( CURRENT TIMESTAMP, #{custNo}, #{tradNo}, #{bizType}, #{prdctId}, #{prdctCd}, #{prdctNm}, #{cddReqCd}, #{brnchNo}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update:
UPDATE NF_TRADINFO_MGT SET
CMPLTN_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP, CNCL_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP,
PRDCT_ID = #{prdctId}, PRDCT_CD = #{prdctCd}, PRDCT_NM = #{prdctNm}, CLERK_NO = #{clerkNo}, CNNCTN_WAY = #{cnnctnWay},
CDD_REQ_CD = null, CDD_REQ_CD = #{cddReqCd},
CDD_CNFRM_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP,
ID_CARD_CD = #{idCardCd}, ID_CARD_REQ_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP, ID_CARD_CNT = #{idCardCnt}, BRNCH_NO = #{brnchNo}, REQ_AMT = #{reqAmt}, ID_CARD_CMPLTN_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP, AUTHNT_IND_CD = #{authntIndCd}, AUTHNT_IND = #{authntInd}, AUTHNT_REQ_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP, AUTHNT_REQ_EXPIRE_DT = DATE(#{authntReqExpireDt}), AUTHNT_REQ_CMPLTN_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP, KFB_ACCT_NO = #{kfbAcctNo}, ALLIANC_CD = #{alliancCd}, EFFCTV_INT = #{effctvInt}, LOAN_PRD = #{loanPrd}, RDMPTN_MTHD = #{rdmptnMthd}, EXEC_DT = #{execDt}, RDMPTN_DT = #{rdmptnDt}, LOAN_REQ_NO = #{loanReqNo}, LOAN_ACCPT_NO = #{loanAccptNo}, ERR_CD = #{errCd}, ERR_MSG = #{errMsg}, COPL_CMMN_CLLTRL_IND = #{coplCmmnClltrlInd}, RJCTN_CD = #{rjctnCd}, RJCTN_MSG = #{rjctnMsg}, PER_PART = #{perPart}, DOC_EVDC_CD = #{docEvdcCd}, LOAN_HOPE_DT = #{loanHopeDt}, HL_PRSN_CD = #{hlPrsnCd}, AD_SBST_CD = #{adSbstCd}, KW_INSR_CD = #{kwInsrCd}, REA_CD = #{reaCd}, INTEGRATED_CONSELING_YN = #{integratedConselingYn}, PRE_LOAN_MOVE_YN = #{preLoanMoveYn}, REAL_LOAN_MOVE_YN = #{realLoanMoveYn}, HQ_PRIME_RATE_APPLY_YN = #{hqPrimeRateApplyYn}, HQ_PRIME_RATE = #{hqPrimeRate}, EASY_LOAN_YN = #{easyLoanYn}, LOAN_DOC_INVSTGT_FLG = #{loanDocInvstgtFlg}, SECURITY_ACCT_NO = #{securityAcctNo}, GOVM_DATA_TYPE = #{govmDataType}, GOVM_SIGN_TYPE = #{govmSignType}, GOVM_SIGN_ERR = #{govmSignErr}, LOAN_PURPOSE = #{loanPurpose}, COLLATERAL_TYPE = #{collateralType}, SPOUSE_CUST_NO = #{spouseCustNo}, SPOUSE_TRAD_NO = #{spouseTradNo}, ADV_SEQ_NO = #{advSeqNo}, ADV_DT = #{advDt}, OPL_CNSLT_YN = #{oplCnsltYn}, CMPLTN_YN = #{cmpltnYn},
CALL_CNTR_STS_CD = #{callCntrStsCd}, PRGRSS_STS_CD = #{prgrssStsCd}, LST_CHNG_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP WHERE TRAD_NO = #{tradNo} AND CUST_NO = #{custNo}
UPDATE NF_TRADINFO_MGT SET PRGRSS_STS_CD = 'CNCL', CNCL_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND TRAD_NO = #{tradNo}
mapper.select: SELECT CUST_NO, TRAD_NO, BIZ_TYPE, PRDCT_ID, PRDCT_CD, PRDCT_NM FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT WHERE TRAD_NO = #{tradNo} WITH UR
